ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer's address */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (individual or business) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (active or inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "order_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order item (unit price * quantity) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product within its category */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the sales representative */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative's manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was hired */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales representative record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales representative record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email) */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
